title: How to Run a Mock Inspection
alt: Five stages of running a pharma mock inspection, from scoping to verification

items.label: Scope against real risk
items.desc: Use ICH Q9, Annex 1, ALCOA+ and GDP to match your licence

items.label: Build a credible scenario
items.desc: Inspector persona, realistic agenda and live document requests

items.label: Run front and back room
items.desc: Time every request; slow retrieval is a finding in itself

items.label: Grade observations
items.desc: Critical, major and other findings, with a closing meeting

items.label: Turn findings into action
items.desc: Triage by risk, assign owners, verify the fix held
